tags.description: The tunnel makes the trip between neighbouring fjords much faster, easier, and much less weather-dependant. Winter conditions on the old roads crossing the mountain are often very harsh, leading to roads being closed.
tags.name: Dýrafjarðargöng
tags.note: Cycling allowed as on almost all Icelandic roads and all but a few tunnels, so cycling=yes is implicit. If there is considerable car traffic while you are cycling there is a narrow sidewalk where you might take refuge.
The path is blocked by concrete walls and trees; it does not pass straight through.
